items.label: Infra Outputs Captured — Interfaces Written
messages: I have all the Terraform outputs. Let me now create the structured interfaces document, masking the sensitive `application_insights_connection_string`.
Now let me commit this file and mark the pipeline step as complete.

The **infra-handoff** phase is complete. Here's a summary of what was done:  ### Completed Work  1. **Read Terraform outputs** — All 14 outputs were captured from the live Terraform state, including the new `cosmosdb_account_name` and `cosmosdb_endpoint` outputs provisioned for the audit-dashboard feature.  2. **Created `/apps/sample-app/in-progress/infra-interfaces.md`** with structured sections:    - **Endpoints** — Function App, APIM Gateway, Static Web App, Cosmos DB endpoint URLs    - **Resource Names** — All Azure resource names for downstream reference    - **Auth Config** — Entra IDs, CI/CD principals, CORS origins    - **Cosmos DB details** — Database (`AuditDB`), container (`AuditLogs`), partition key (`/userId`), serverless mode, MI RBAC auth    - **Full Terraform Outputs** — All outputs with sensitive values masked (`application_insights_connection_string` → `<HIDDEN>`)    - **Developer Notes** — Guidance for backend-dev (DefaultAzureCredential, COSMOS_ENDPOINT env var) and frontend-dev (API base URL, auth mode)  3. **Committed and marked pipeline complete** — `pipeline:complete audit-dashboard infra-handoff` succeeded.

shellCommands.command: cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh pipeline "chore(pipeline): infra-handoff interfaces"
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && npm run pipeline:complete audit-dashboard infra-handoff
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh pipeline "chore(pipeline): mark Infra Outputs Captured — Interfaces Written"

items.label: Development Complete — Backend
messages: Now let me understand the codebase structure and existing patterns:
The schema barrel already exports audit schemas. Let me check what already exists:
Good - schema exists, barrel export is set, fn-audit.ts is MISSING. Let me check more existing patterns:
Now I have a complete picture. Let me check the existing schema tests:

I have complete context. Schema, schema tests, and barrel exports are already done. I need to: 1. Add `@azure/cosmos` + `@azure/identity` to backend deps 2. Create `fn-audit.ts` (POST + GET handlers) 3. Create unit tests `fn-audit.test.ts` 4. Add integration tests to `smoke.integration.test.ts` 5. Append validate-app hook 6. Build and verify  Let me start implementing:
Now add integration tests for the audit endpoints:
Now install dependencies and run the build:
All entry points load successfully. Now run the tests:
The issue is my `jest.mock("crypto")` replaced the entire module, breaking `crypto.createHash` used by `@azure/functions`. I need to fix this:
All 34 tests pass (11 integration tests skipped as expected). Now run type checking and linting:
All clear. Now let me also verify schema tests pass:
All 50 schema tests pass. Let me run the post-change review:
Review looks clean — no breaking changes, no new issues. Now let me commit and complete:

shellCommands.command: cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app/backend && for f in dist/src/functions/fn-*.js; do echo "Testing: $f"; node -e "require('./$f')" 2>&1 || { echo "FATAL: $f failed to load"; exit 1; }; echo "OK"
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app/backend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 && echo "TSC OK" && npm run lint 2>&1

cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && npm run pipeline:doc-note audit-dashboard backend-dev "Added fn-audit.ts with POST /audit (create event in Cosmos DB) and GET /audit (latest 50 events). Uses lazy CosmosClie
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh backend "feat(audit): add fn-audit.ts POST/GET endpoints with Cosmos DB, unit tests, integration tests, and validate-app hook"
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && npm run pipeline:complete audit-dashboard backend-dev
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && npm install 2>&1 | tail -5 && npm run pipeline:complete audit-dashboard backend-dev
